ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of the area (e.g., local authority, region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area for geographical mapping */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area for geographical mapping */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area (people per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_dates" (
  "specimen_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen date */,
  "specimen_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specimen date record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specimen date record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_cases" (
  "daily_cases_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily cases record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which data is collected */,
  "specimen_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specimen date */,
  "daily_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of lab-confirmed cases recorded on the given date */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease type */,
  "testing_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing site where the specimen was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the daily cases record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the daily cases record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daily_cases_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_specimen_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_date_id") REFERENCES specimen_dates ("specimen_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_testing_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("testing_site_id") REFERENCES testing_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_cases" (
  "cumulative_cases_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cumulative cases record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for which data is collected */,
  "cumulative_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of lab-confirmed cases up to the specified date */,
  "cumulative_rate" REAL /* Rate of cumulative cases per 100,000 population */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cumulative cases record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cumulative cases record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_cases_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_cases_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_cases_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for population records */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population statistics record was last updated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data to track historical changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for health office records */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the health office */,
  "office_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the office */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area managed by the office */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Full address of the health office */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the health office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health office record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health office record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_offices_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the disease */,
  "is_contagious" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the disease is contagious */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission for the disease */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Average incubation period in days */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the testing site */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area served by the testing site */,
  "site_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the testing site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the testing site record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the testing site record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_sites_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area for vaccination records */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinated individuals */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate per 100,000 population */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "first_dose_count" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose_count" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vaccination data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarantine_data" (
  "quarantine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quarantine record */,
  "daily_cases_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily cases record */,
  "quarantine_start" TEXT /* Start date of quarantine */,
  "quarantine_end" TEXT /* End date of quarantine */,
  "quarantine_location" TEXT /* Location where the quarantine is taking place */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quarantine data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quarantine data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarantine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarantine_data_daily_cases_id FOREIGN KEY ("daily_cases_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("daily_cases_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated disease */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated disease */,
  "guideline_text" TEXT /* Text of the treatment guideline */,
  "guideline_source" TEXT /* Source of the treatment guideline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment guideline record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment guideline record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_guidelines_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient record */,
  "daily_cases_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated daily cases record */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "patient_health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the patient during treatment */,
  "patient_address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "patient_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the patient is treated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospital_data ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_daily_cases_id FOREIGN KEY ("daily_cases_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("daily_cases_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area served by the hospital */,
  "hospital_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the hospital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hospital data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hospital data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, health official) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
